title: Cinematic Action Scene AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic surreal action photo built around young woman reaching toward the camera while falling forward through a surreal everyday-object vortex, inside a cozy warm room, arms outstretched toward the camera as if trying to catch herself, and leaping Rottweiler holding a donut, soft teddy bear, open books with flipping pages, scattered objects, and warm-room debris orbiting her. Subject: young woman reaching toward the camera while falling forward through a surreal everyday-object vortex is the clear action hero, physically readable and close to the camera during the fall. Scene: inside a cozy warm room, arms outstretched toward the camera as if trying to catch herself provides a cozy domestic room transformed into a warm cinematic vortex, with believable depth and practical window light. Composition: arms outstretched toward the camera as if trying to catch herself, frozen in chaotic slow motion; fixed dramatic 35mm perspective, forward-falling body angle, objects orbiting around the subject, strong foreground depth, shallow depth of field, and freeze-frame motion. Signature Elements: leaping Rottweiler holding a donut, soft teddy bear, open books with flipping pages, scattered objects, and warm-room debris orbiting her orbit in chaotic slow motion with suspended coffee splash, flipping pages, floating pillows, scattered papers, and domestic debris. Style: Ultra-realistic studio-quality cinematic photography with surreal storytelling, dynamic motion blur, high detail, warm sunlight, and physically believable suspended objects. Color Palette: Fixed cozy warm-room palette with golden sunlight, beige clothing, pink donut accents, red backpack accent, paper whites, and soft shadow contrast. Lighting: Sunlight streams through a window and casts soft golden shadows while liquid, pages, hair, and airborne objects remain readable. Camera: 35mm lens feeling, dramatic perspective, shallow depth of field, and close foreground reach toward the viewer. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
